content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 — user-visible Swift string labels a shipping feature "Experimental" (App/SettingsView.swift:14)
Pierre: Apple's 2.2 wants App Store builds to feel finished, not like a beta or test. The store metadata is clean, but the "AI Sort" toggle in SettingsView shows "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" — user-facing copy that signals an unfinished feature and may trigger review questions. Consider rewording to describe the feature without "experimental"/"may be unstable," or gate the feature until it's stable.
